spacing_and_layout.general: Generous spacing. p-8, p-12, p-20. Use bento grids for services. Always ensure optical alignment.
spacing_and_layout.hero: Full height or min-h-[90vh], center or left aligned depending on visual balance. Heavy use of negative space.
spacing_and_layout.cards: Subtle 1px border with gold tint (border-[#B8974A]/20). Background #162A42 or glassmorphism. Padding p-8 or p-10.

components.buttons: Primary: Solid Gold background (#B8974A) with Dark Navy text (#0D1B2A). Hover: Lighter Gold (#D4AF37). Secondary: Transparent with Gold border and Off-white text. Use group-hover for subtle arrow movements.
components.navigation: Sticky glassmorphism header (backdrop-blur-xl bg-[#0D1B2A]/80) with gold accents on hover. Do not hide desktop links behind hamburger.
components.cards_and_surfaces: Use 'Glassmorphism (The Crystal Variant)' for premium feel. bg-[#0D1B2A]/60, backdrop-blur-xl, border-[#B8974A]/20. Or flat #162A42.
components.forms: Shadcn components customized. Inputs should have transparent/dark backgrounds with border-[#B8974A]/30 and focus:border-[#B8974A]. Text F5F5F0.

motion_and_interactions.general: Smooth, elegant transitions. Use Framer Motion. Fade-in up for text. Staggered reveals for bento grids.
motion_and_interactions.hover_effects: Subtle lift (-translate-y-1) for cards. Border color illuminates to solid gold. Button arrows slide right.

hero_background.description: High-end corporate office at twilight, use with heavy dark navy gradient overlay.

abstract_texture.description: Abstract gold and navy texture. Great for Services or Values section background.

finance_details.description: Premium fountain pen on financial documents. Use in Services page (Audit/Accounting).

team_member_1.description: Professional business woman in navy suit. Use in Team section.

office_meeting.description: Diverse team in modern conference room. Use for About page or Services.

office_interior.description: Modern office interior. Good for Contact page background.

sections: Hero: Title 'Votre performance financière, notre priorité.', CTAs, heavy navy overlay on hero_background.
Values: 3 cards/sections (Rigueur, Confidentialité, Expertise) using abstract_texture.
Metrics: Key financial stats (e.g., AUM, years experience) in large gold serif font.
Services Overview: Bento grid of 4 cards (Audit & Diagnostic, Contrôle de Gestion, Conseil & Accompagnement, Exercice Comptable).
Testimonials Preview: Carousel or 2 highlighted quotes.
CTA: 'Prêt à optimiser vos performances ?' -> Contact.
Company Presentation: Text heavy, elegant typography, office_meeting image alongside.
Core Values: 4 values (Rigueur, Confidentialité, Proximité, Excellence).
Team: Grid using team_member_1 and similar placeholders.
Detailed Sections: 4 distinct sections alternating left/right layout. Use finance_details image for visual interest.
Grid Layout: Masonry or bento grid of client quotes. Subtle glassmorphism cards.
Contact Layout: Split screen. Left: Contact info (bknx.advisory@gmx.fr, +33 6 16 26 88 50) and office_interior image. Right: Form (Nom, Prénom, Email, Téléphone, Objet, Message) with validation.

testing.requirements: All interactive and key informational elements MUST include a data-testid attribute. Use kebab-case, role-based.

instructions_to_main_agent: Use Lucide icons with strokeWidth={1} or {1.5} to match the 'thin outline' requirement.
Use Framer Motion for entrance animations (staggered fade-up).
Install and configure Cormorant Garamond and Inter fonts via Google Fonts in index.html.
Follow the color palette strictly: Backgrounds #0D1B2A, Text #F5F5F0, Accents #B8974A.
Use pure HTML/Tailwind for complex overlapping bento layouts, use Shadcn for standard Form, Input, Button, Card.
Ensure all contrast ratios are met, especially when placing text over images (use #0D1B2A gradient overlays).
